# growthbook_projects (Data Source)

Read all GrowthBook projects.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) All projects in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Project description.
- `id` (String) Project ID.
- `name` (String) Project name.
- `stats_engine` (String) Default statistics engine.
